description: Negative/error-path: After reconnect, no auth/required notification is re-sent by the server for tokens that were already being refreshed before disconnect. Client surfaces JSON-RPC error code -32601.
notes: Auto-generated from D7 negative paths: auth.auth-required.edge.not-replayed-on-reconnect. auth/required is a server-initiated notification and is ephemeral; it is NOT included in reconnect replay. Clients SHOULD re-check auth after reconnecting.

steps.label: send auth/required to trigger the error condition
